description: Non-acting protocol foundation shared by the future Windows Setup CLI and UI. This fixture does not claim an installer, Windows probe, elevation, DPAPI, service, or recovery implementation.
invariants: The protocol module never executes a host action
The same observation and request produce byte-equivalent canonical plan content and the same plan id
A blocked preflight produces only refused actions
A target release or lock identity mismatch produces only refused actions
Dry-run receipts name every planned action and prove that no host action executed
Already-satisfied operations produce a no-op plan and no-op receipt
Applied, partial, and failed states are reserved for a future executor and are never emitted by the skeleton
Observations and serialization contain no secret or private-key values
Windows installation, elevation, DPAPI, WinSW, Scheduled Task, and live recovery remain unimplemented until separately qualified
